Package index

All functions

BIC(<coxgrp>)
BIC for Multiple-sources Cox proportional hazards model with group sparsity
BIC(<coxmtl>)
BIC for Multi-source Cox proportional hazards model
BIC(<coxsg>)
BIC for Subgroup analysis of Cox proportional hazards model
BIC(<coxtl>)
BIC of Transfer Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
BIC(<ncvcox>)
BIC for Non-convex penalized Cox proportional hazards model
calc_lambda_max()
Determine the maximum value of the penalty parameter lambda
coxens()
Multiple-sources Cox proportional hazards model with group sparsity and Local-Global transfer
coxgrp()
Multiple-sources Cox proportional hazards model with group sparsity
coxmtl()
Multi-task Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
coxmtl_oracle()
Multi-task Learning of Cox proportional hazards model (Oracle)
coxsg()
Subgroup Analysis for Cox proportional hazards model
coxsg_oracle()
Personalized Multi-task Learning of Cox proportional hazards model (Oracle)
coxtl()
Transfer Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
coxtl_group()
Transfer Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
coxtl_oracle()
Transfer Learning for Cox proportional hazards model (Oracle) without constraints
cv_ncvcox()
Cross-validation for ncvcox
cv_odetrans()
Cross-validation for survtran
logLik(<coxens>)
Log-likelihood of a subgroup analysis for Cox proportional hazards model
logLik(<coxmtl>)
Log-likelihood of a Multi-task Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
logLik(<coxsg>)
Log-likelihood of a subgroup analysis for Cox proportional hazards model
logLik(<coxtl>)
Log-likelihood of Transfer Learning for Cox proportional hazards model
logLik(<ncvcox>)
Log-likelihood of Non-convex penalized Cox proportional hazards model
ncvcox()
Non-convex penalized Cox proportional hazards model
odetrans()
Transfer Learning for Survival Analysis via Ordinary Differential Equations
sim1
Simulated Group Survival Data: One-source Transfer Learning
sim2
Simulated Group Survival Data: Multiple-source Transfer Learning
simsurv_tl()
Simulate survival data of Multi-source Cox model
survtrans_control()
Ancillary arguments for controlling survtrans fitting
